list.title: module:geolocation
list.description: Requests the user's current position and stores the coordinates in localStorage. Fires a coordsReady CustomEvent so other modules (e.g. weather.js) can react without needing to request location themselves.

list.title: module:geolocation~error
list.description: Handles geolocation errors by logging a warning to the console.

list.title: module:geolocation~success
list.description: Handles successful geolocation retrieval.

list.title: module:middleware
list.description: Vercel Edge middleware that attaches security headers to every outbound response. Runs before the cache on every request.

list.title: module:middleware
list.description:
Adds security-related HTTP response headers to every request.

Headers applied:

  • Referrer-Policy: origin-when-cross-origin
  • X-Frame-Options: DENY
  • X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  • X-DNS-Prefetch-Control: on
  • Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

list.title: module:routes/events
list.description: Express router for events data. Placeholder implementation — full events API integration is pending.

list.title: module:routes/events~GET /api/events
list.description: Events route placeholder. Returns a stub message until the events API is wired up.

list.title: module:routes/events~healthCheck
list.description: Health check for the events service. Always returns ok while the route is a local stub with no external dependency.

list.title: module:routes/index
list.description: Root API router. Mounts all service sub-routers and exposes a combined /api/health endpoint that aggregates the health status of every downstream service.

list.title: module:routes/index~GET /api/health
list.description: Aggregated health check across all registered API services.

list.title: module:routes/news
list.description: Express router for news data. Placeholder implementation — full news API integration is pending.

list.title: module:routes/news~GET /api/news
list.description: News route placeholder. Returns a stub message until the news API is wired up.

list.title: module:routes/news~healthCheck
list.description: Health check for the news service. Always returns ok while the route is a local stub with no external dependency.

list.title: module:routes/weather
list.description: Express router for weather data. Fetches current conditions and a 7-day forecast from the Open-Meteo API using the caller's coordinates.

list.title: module:routes/weather~Base
list.description: URL for the Open-Meteo forecast API.

list.title: module:routes/weather~GET /api/weather
list.description: Fetches current weather conditions and a 7-day forecast for the given latitude/longitude coordinates.

list.title: module:routes/weather~healthCheck
list.description: Performs a minimal probe of the Open-Meteo API to verify reachability. The API has no dedicated health endpoint, so this fires the smallest valid forecast request (single variable, null island) and checks for a response.

list.title: module:server
list.description: Express application entry point. Serves static files from public/ and mounts all API routes under /api.

list.title: module:weather
list.description: Fetches weather data from the server and renders it on the page. Implements localStorage caching (30-minute TTL) to reduce API calls and improve performance. Listens for the coordsReady geolocation event when coordinates are not yet available.

list.title: module:weather-detail
list.description: Renders detailed current conditions and a 7-day forecast on weather.html. Reads from the shared localStorage cache populated by weather.js, or waits for the weatherReady event if the cache is stale or missing.

list.title: module:weather-detail~Full
list.description: day names indexed by Date.getDay().

list.title: module:weather-detail~degreesToCardinal
list.description: Converts a wind direction in degrees to an 8-point cardinal direction string.

list.title: module:weather-detail~initDetailWeather
list.description:
Initializes the weather detail page using the following strategy:

  1. If fresh cached data exists in localStorage (within 30-minute TTL), render it immediately.
  2. Otherwise, wait for the weatherReady event fired by weather.js.

list.title: module:weather-detail~renderDetailWeather
list.description:
Renders the full weather detail view including current conditions and the 7-day forecast cards.

Targeted element IDs for current conditions:

  • #detail-temp, #detail-feels-like, #detail-humidity
  • #detail-cloud, #detail-precip, #detail-rain, #detail-showers
  • #detail-wind-speed, #detail-wind-dir, #detail-wind-gusts
  • #detail-updated

Targeted element ID for forecast: #forecast-cards (innerHTML replaced).

list.title: module:weather~Cache
list.description: time-to-live for weather data in milliseconds (30 min).

list.title: module:weather~degreesToCardinal
list.description: Converts a wind direction in degrees to an 8-point cardinal direction string.

list.title: module:weather~fetchWeatherData
list.description: Fetches weather data from /api/weather for the given coordinates, caches the result in localStorage, then renders it on the page.

list.title: module:weather~initWeather
list.description:
Initializes weather data fetching and rendering using the following strategy:

  1. If fresh cached data exists in localStorage (within {@link WEATHER_TTL}), render it immediately.
  2. If coordinates are already stored in localStorage, fetch fresh data.
  3. Otherwise, wait for the coordsReady event fired by geolocation.js.

list.title: module:weather~renderWeatherData
list.description:
Renders the current weather conditions into the DOM and fires the weatherReady CustomEvent so dependent modules (e.g. weather-detail.js) can react.

Targeted element IDs:

  • #weather-temp
  • #weather-feels-like
  • #weather-humidity
  • #weather-wind
  • #weather-precip
  • #weather-cloud
